description: Composition Black top made of a blended satin fabric, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, full buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves with a buttoned tab, pleats at the back yoke and a vented and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic in classic black, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and matching tights. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
